{% extends "layouts/main-external.html" %} {% set activeNavigation = "View licences" %} {% set pageName="Choose a licence holder" %} {% set selectedHolder = data.selectedLicenceHolder or "Bottled Water Plc" %} {% block containerStart %} {{ govukBackLink({ href: "/external/licences", text: "Back to licences" }) }} {% endblock %} {% block content %}
{{ govukRadios({ name: "licenceHolder", value: selectedHolder, fieldset: { legend: { text: pageName, isPageHeading: false, classes: "govuk-fieldset__legend--l" } }, items: [ { value: "Bottled Water Plc", text: "Bottled Water Plc" }, { value: "Big Smith Farms Ltd", text: "Big Smith Farms Ltd" }, { value: "Irene Briton", text: "Irene Briton" }, { value: "Robin Vithlhem-Smith", text: "Robin Vithlhem-Smith" }, { value: "D.B. Beecham-Smith", text: "D.B. Beecham-Smith" }, { value: "Public Water Plc", text: "Public Water Plc" } ] }) }} {{ govukButton({ text: "Continue", type: "submit" }) }}
{% endblock %}
